overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a dark abandoned village at night, holding a wooden torch that illuminates the dirt path and rustic wooden structures. The player walks steadily through the settlement, passing wooden posts and fences while approaching dilapidated cabins.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned village outskirts with scattered wooden posts

events.description: torch flame ignites and brightens, casting warm orange light on the dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dark outskirts while holding a wooden torch that flares to life

entered.detail: hand-held wooden torch with metal banding, initially unlit then burning with orange flame
uneven dirt trail with scattered stones and debris
dilapidated wooden hut with sloped roof barely visible in the darkness
vertical wooden stake sticking out of the ground
dense dark trees forming the background horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark abandoned village outskirts at night. The player holds a wooden torch that ignites around the 6-second mark, casting warm light on the dirt path ahead. Wooden posts dot the landscape, and a dilapidated cabin is visible in the distance against a backdrop of dark forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced village path with rustic wooden buildings

events.description: passing from open outskirts into a more defined path lined with wooden fencing
torch is lowered out of frame, reducing the field of illumination

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the fenced dirt path, moving closer to the village buildings

entered.detail: rustic wooden picket fence running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the open outskirts into a more enclosed village path bordered by a wooden fence on the left. The dilapidated cabin grows larger and more detailed as the player approaches. Around the 20-second mark, the torch is lowered out of view, dimming the immediate surroundings as the walk continues toward the dark forest beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the dark outskirts of an abandoned village toward a dilapidated cabin and the encroaching forest. It begins on a dim dirt path where a wooden torch ignites, casting a warm, flickering glow over scattered wooden posts and the distant silhouette of a cabin. As the camera advances, the open landscape shifts into a more enclosed village path bordered by a rustic wooden fence on the left. The dilapidated cabin grows larger and more detailed in the light before the torch is lowered out of view, dimming the immediate surroundings. The scene finally fades into deeper shadow as the movement continues toward the dark, looming forest beyond.
